name: Agent Relay
description: Wake agents in existing sessions via gateway WebSocket RPC. Provides wake_agent tool and HTTP endpoint.

authToken.description: Bearer token for authenticating HTTP requests to /notify

gatewayToken.description: Gateway auth token (from gateway.auth.token in openclaw.json)

allowedTargets.description: Per-agent ACL: which sessionKey patterns each agent can target. Keys are agent IDs, values are arrays of sessionKey patterns (supports trailing :* wildcard). Omit to allow all targets.

gatewayToken.label: Gateway Token
gatewayToken.help: Copy from gateway.auth.token in your openclaw.json
